pkgmetadata.longdescription: HyprMod is a native GTK4/libadwaita settings app for Hyprland — tweak any option, see it change live, save when you are happy. Provides live preview, monitor layout editor with VRR/HDR/10-bit detection, bezier curve editor, keybind editor with interactive key capture, cursor theme picker, profiles, undo, and global search. Writes only to its own hyprland-gui.conf so the hand-crafted config stays untouched.
